title: AgentBridge Manifest
description: Machine-readable description of structured actions a web app exposes to AI agents. Served at /.well-known/agentbridge.json.

name.description: Human-readable name of the AgentBridge surface (the app or product).

description.description: One-paragraph summary of what this surface lets agents do.

version.description: Semver version of the manifest. Bump on action additions, removals, or schema changes.

baseUrl.description: Canonical origin agents should call for actions. All action endpoints must share this origin.

contact.description: Email or URL for the manifest publisher.

auth.description: How agents authenticate to this surface.

resources.description: Conceptual data resources actions touch (orders, customers, tickets, etc.). Documentation, not enforcement.

generatedAt.description: Optional ISO timestamp of when the manifest was last generated.

scope.description: Free-form scope identifier the agent must hold to call this action (e.g. orders:write).

name.description: Stable machine identifier. snake_case. Treat as part of your public API.

description.description: Agent-friendly description: WHEN should an agent call this?

inputSchema.description: JSON Schema describing the action's input. Should be type: object with explicit properties.

outputSchema.description: JSON Schema describing the action's output. Optional but strongly encouraged.

endpoint.description: Path under baseUrl where this action is invoked, e.g. /api/agentbridge/actions/refund_order.

risk.description: Risk classification. low = read-only/safe. medium = mutates app state. high = irreversible or financially significant.

requiresConfirmation.description: If true, agents (or the MCP layer) must obtain explicit human approval before calling.

humanReadableSummaryTemplate.description: Template with {{key}} placeholders. Used to render natural-language confirmation prompts.
